action_set_definitions.name: get_simulation_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current simulation clock, active runway configuration, and a list of aircraft currently in the sector.

action_set_definitions.name: get_aircraft_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the comprehensive state of a specific aircraft, including its wake category, ground speed (GS), distance to the MERGE waypoint, fuel level, and flight status.

callsign.description: The unique callsign of the aircraft.

action_set_definitions.name: set_aircraft_speed
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the ground speed of a specific aircraft to manage spacing and prevent speed convergence.

target_gs.description: The target ground speed in knots.

action_set_definitions.name: calculate_distance
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates the current distance in nautical miles between two aircraft.

action_set_definitions.name: issue_merge_clearance
action_set_definitions.description: Commands an aircraft to exit its sequencing leg and turn directly toward the MERGE waypoint.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_time
action_set_definitions.description: Progresses the simulation by a specified number of seconds, updating all aircraft positions and environmental variables.

state_description.simulation_clock: Current simulation time in seconds from start.
state_description.aircraft_queue: List of all aircraft currently under sector control.
state_description.runway_status: The current availability and schedule of the airport runways.
